summary: Pack 1 - Service & Promo Experience Fix testing completed. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified: 6 service pages resolve correctly with static fallback data, in-account marketplace shows 24 services (20+ requirement met), PromoMultiBlankBuilder submits multi-item promo requests with promo_items array, CantFindWhatYouNeedBanner visible on service/marketplace pages with working CTA, QuoteRequestPage 'Other / Not Sure' lane sends contact_general request type, URL pre-selection works for service_quote and promo_custom.
critical_code_review_comments: comprehensiveServiceData.js contains 21 service entries with full content - all services from navigation dropdown have static fallback
DynamicServiceDetailPage.jsx correctly falls back to getServiceBySlug() when API returns 404
MarketplaceUnifiedPageV3.jsx merges API data with static data using getAllServicesForGrid() - shows 24 services
PromoMultiBlankBuilder.jsx correctly submits to /api/requests with request_type=promo_custom and promo_items array in details
CantFindWhatYouNeedBanner.jsx correctly navigates to /request-quote on CTA click
QuoteRequestPage.jsx correctly maps 'other' primary_need to contact_general request_type
requests_module_routes.py includes contact_general in valid_types for /api/requests endpoint
seed_data_creation: Created test requests via /api/public-requests and /api/requests for service_quote, promo_custom, promo_sample, contact_general types
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pack 1 stabilization complete. All 21 services from comprehensiveServiceData.js resolve correctly via static fallback. Service pages tested: fumigation-services, office-branding, deep-office-cleaning, cctv-installation, graphic-design-support, printer-servicing - all show correct content without 'Service Not Found'. In-account marketplace Services tab shows 24 service cards (merged from API + static data). PromoMultiBlankBuilder tested with multi-item submission - promo_items array correctly stored in request details. CantFindWhatYouNeedBanner visible on service detail pages, public marketplace, and in-account marketplace - CTA navigates to /request-quote. QuoteRequestPage 'Other / Not Sure' lane correctly sends contact_general request type. URL pre-selection tested: ?type=service_quote pre-selects Services lane, ?type=promo_custom pre-selects Promo lane. Service Request CTA on service pages routes to /request-quote?type=service_quote&service=<slug>. All requests appear in admin Requests Inbox (not guest_leads).
